title: Ebola treatment hospital burned down in DRC as outbreak spreads
full_text:
Ebola treatment hospital burned down in DRC as outbreak spreads
Ebola treatment hospital burned down in DRC as outbreak spreads
Protesters set a hospital on fire in the Democratic of Congo, as health authorities warn the latest outbreak of Ebola ‘is not small’ and requires ‘all hands on deck’. Clashes broke out after a family disputed that Ebola caused the death of their loved one and demanded custody of the body.
Published On 21 May 2026
